growth_records.strain: MAG-based population (n=5 MAGs), not axenic culture
growth_records.medium: Freshwater reservoir water column (epilimnion), Římov Reservoir, Czech Republic
growth_records.cite: Kavagutti et al. High-resolution metagenomic reconstruction of the freshwater spring bloom. Microbiome (2023). DOI:10.1186/s40168-022-01451-4. [PMC9878933]
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (87.85 ± 35.01 h) is the CARD-FISH 'Observed, in situ' value from Table 1. growth_rate_per_h = ln2/87.85 = 0.0079 h-1. Alternative metagenomic-based observed value (80.1 h), mortality-corrected estimates (43.43 h CARD-FISH; 44.2 h metagenomic), and gRodon estimate (11.2 h) also reported but not used here.
